query: SELECT id, name, email, turmaId, consultorId, trilhaId, status, classificacao FROM alunos WHERE name LIKE '%Brenno%' OR name LIKE '%Ilda%' OR name LIKE '%Storferi%' OR name LIKE '%Bisoni%' OR name LIKE '%Passoni%';
